action.reasoning: Observation: best remains 0.8173 from ensemble_clip_v1/clip_v2; recent inspection revealed exact ensemble weights and that noisy-validation optimization was unreliable. Analysis: remaining gains may come from a cheap inference-level change or carefully chosen descriptor, but I still need the exact predict.py/model.py behavior because ensemble averaging could be logits or probabilities and TTA details affect which descriptors are meaningful. Decision: inspect predict.py and model.py concisely before editing or submitting another candidate.
action.command: sed -n '1,260p' predict.py && printf '\n--- model.py ---\n' && sed -n '1,220p' model.py
